title: Rocket Boots II
description: Reimagine flight with Rocket Boots. Traverse the world freely and efficiently. Now in three modes and more capable than ever.

![Three new modes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b9fdee1d3a8d88089f743306b042b8f4248a7985_0.webp)
![Far above the world](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49d744bc311c52f5518f1e778c41f68e0737a1a6_0.webp)
![Material compendium](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f5e8930a3a27484242fe1a2a3b4edf866898824c_0.webp)

# Rocket Boots II
With Rocket Boots, you can travel through world in efficient, but still satisfying ways. This mod is the continuation of the original [Rocket Boots mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/rocket-boots), with brand new features and improvements.

## Three New Modes
Rocket Boots now come with roam mode, hover mode, and traverse mode.

- Roam Mode allows for continuous height-adjusted traveling through any terrain, making it the standard option for navigating the world. You can get a good look at the world and feel at peace.
- Hover Mode allows for stable hovering mid-air, with manual movement controls. This is useful for building and situations where you need to stay still.
- Traverse Mode allows for ground-level navigation, with an upward boost to help you traverse difficult terrain, such as extreme hills.

## Improved Boosting & Height Control
- Speed Boosting is now much more effective, and allows for fast travel at any direction. It also leaves behind a beautiful trail that can be followed for a short while.
- Height Control now comes with adjustable levels.

## Fueling
- Fuel can be brewed with Magma Cream into Dragon's Breath bottles.
- Each fuel canister is now reusable and can restore a maximum of 100% fuel.

## UI & Controls
- An intuitive control panel shows the status of your Rocket Boots.
- By default, use B to engage speed boosters, Shift to engage height control, and V to switch modes.


This project requires playerAnimator.
